name: @kamishino/kamiflow-codex
description: Kami Flow CLI with in-repo dogfooding fixtures.

scripts.test: npm run build:server && npm run test:fast
scripts.test:fast: npm run kfc-plan:test && npm run kfc-session:test && npm run kfc-chat:test && npm run kfc-web:test && npm run verify:skills-contract && npm run verify:codex-intelligence
scripts.test:integration: npm run kfc-plan:test:integration && npm run remote:smoke
scripts.test:full: npm run test:fast && npm run test:integration
scripts.verify:all: npm run test && npm run verify:governance && npm run verify:kfc-plan-design-system && npm run verify:quickstart && npm run verify:client-kickoff
scripts.typecheck: npm run verify:typescript-first && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-runtime typecheck && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-web-runtime typecheck && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-plan-web typecheck && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-chat typecheck && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-session typecheck && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-web typecheck && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-plan-desktop typecheck && npm run -w @kamishino/kfc-web-ui typecheck
scripts.codex:setup: npm run build:server && npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/codex/setup-local.js
scripts.codex:sync: npm run build:server && npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/codex/sync-resources-to-agents.js
scripts.codex:sync:skills: npm run build:server && npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/codex/sync-resources-to-agents.js --only skills
scripts.codex:sync:rules: npm run build:server && npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/codex/sync-resources-to-agents.js --only rules
scripts.codex:sync:rules:dogfood: npm run build:server && npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/codex/sync-resources-to-agents.js --only rules --profile dogfood
scripts.codex:sync:rules:client: npm run build:server && npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/codex/sync-resources-to-agents.js --only rules --profile client
scripts.bootstrap: npm run codex:setup && npm run codex:sync -- --scope repo --force && npm run hooks:enable
scripts.commit:check: npm run build:scripts && git log -1 --pretty=%B | node dist/scripts/git-hooks/commit-msg.js --stdin
scripts.kfc-plan:init: npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/kfc-plan/run-kfc-plan.js init
scripts.kfc-web:serve: npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/kfc-web/run-kfc-web.js serve
scripts.kfc-web:dev: npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/kfc-web/run-kfc-web.js dev
scripts.kfc-plan:serve: npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/kfc-web/run-kfc-web.js serve --focus plan
scripts.kfc-plan:validate: npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/kfc-plan/run-kfc-plan.js validate
scripts.kfc-session:serve: npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/kfc-web/run-kfc-web.js serve --focus session
scripts.kfc-chat:serve: npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/kfc-web/run-kfc-web.js serve --focus chat
scripts.remote:smoke: npm run build:server && npm run build:scripts && node dist/scripts/remote/smoke-remote-serve.js
scripts.verify:governance: npm run verify:command-boundary && npm run verify:codex-client-contract && npm run verify:codex-intelligence && npm run verify:typescript-first && npm run verify:workspace-hygiene && npm run verify:docs-artifacts && npm run verify:docs-freshness && npm run verify:route-health
scripts.verify:kfc-plan-design-system: npm run verify:kfc-plan-contrast && npm run verify:kfc-plan-spacing-grid
